heading: Get Started
body:
To quickly try RAG with MongoDB Vector Search, use the
[Chatbot Demo Builder](https://search-playground.mongodb.com/tools/chatbot-demo-builder/snapshots/new)
in the MongoDB Search Playground. To learn more, see [Chatbot Demo Builder](avs-playground).

To implement your own RAG system with MongoDB Vector Search, see the
[Tutorial](basic-rag-example) on this page.
